title: PlanNet
description: Planning and development cases including zoning, subdivisions, and permit applications.
abstract: Data that supports the PlanNet web map application used by the Maricopa County Planning and Development Department and the general public. It includes information pertinent to the various planning and development cases: Zoning Cases, Subdivisions, Development Master Plans, Comprehensive Plan Amendments, Military Compatibility Permits, Drainage Review Boards Cases, Land Use Cases and Variances.
provider: the Maricopa County Planning and Development Department and the general public
